    theorem fin_range_eq {sz : Nat} :
      fin_range sz = fin_range' sz := by
        induction sz with
        | zero => rfl
        | succ n HR =>
          dsimp [fin_range]; rw [HR]; dsimp [fin_range']
          simp only [
            List.replicate, List.length_cons, List.mapFinIdx_cons, Fin.zero_eta,
            map_mapFinIdx, lift_fin
          ]

    theorem fin_in_fin_range' (sz : Nat) (i : Fin sz) : i ‚ąą fin_range' sz := by
      simp only [fin_range', List.mem_mapFinIdx, List.length_replicate]
      exists i.1, i.2

    theorem fin_in_fin_range (sz : Nat) (i : Fin sz) : i ‚ąą fin_range sz := by
      rw [fin_range_eq]; exact fin_in_fin_range' sz i

    theorem fin_range_len (sz : Nat) :
      (fin_range sz).length = sz := by
        induction sz with
        | zero => rfl
        | succ sz HR => simpa [fin_range, HR]

    def fin_range_len_cast {sz : Nat} : Fin (fin_range sz).

```t
    def fin_range (sz : Nat) : List (Fin sz) :=
      match sz with
      | 0 => []
      | sz' + 1 => ‚ü®0, Nat.zero_lt_succ _‚ü© :: (fin_range sz').map lift_fin

    def fin_range' (sz : Nat) : List (Fin sz) :=
      List.replicate sz 0
      |>.mapFinIdx (őĽ i _ h => ‚ü®i, by rwa [List.length_replicate] at h‚ü©)
```

Now the relevant theorems.

```tactics
    theorem map_mapFinIdx {őĪ ő≤ őī} (l : List őĪ) (f : (i : Nat) ‚Üí őĪ ‚Üí (h : i < l.length) ‚Üí ő≤) (g : ő≤ ‚Üí őī) :
      (l.mapFinIdx f).map g = l.mapFinIdx (őĽ i v h => g (f i v h)) := by
        revert f g
        induction l with
        | nil => intros _ _; rfl
        | cons hd tl HR =>
          intro f g
          simp only [List.mapFinIdx_cons, List.map_cons, HR, List.length_cons]

    theorem fin_range_eq {sz : Nat} :
      fin_range sz = fin_range' sz := by
        induction sz with
        | zero => rfl
        | succ n HR =>
          dsimp [fin_range]; rw [HR]; dsimp [fin_range']
          simp only [
            List.replicate, List.length_cons, List.mapFinIdx_cons, Fin.zero_eta,
            map_mapFinIdx, lift_fin
          ]
```

The relevant theorems about `fin_range` are defined. Now we can define the `RelIO` and `RelInt` parts.

```tactics
    theorem fin_in_fin_range' (sz : Nat) (i : Fin sz) : i ‚ąą fin_range' sz := by
      simp only [fin_range', List.mem_mapFinIdx, List.length_replicate]
      exists i.1, i.2

    theorem fin_in_fin_range (sz : Nat) (i : Fin sz) : i ‚ąą fin_range sz := by
      rw [fin_range_eq]; exact fin_in_fin_range' sz i

    theorem fin_range_len (sz : Nat) :
      (fin_range sz).length = sz := by
        induction sz with
        | zero => rfl
        | succ sz HR => simpa [fin_range, HR]

    def fin_range_len_cast {sz : Nat} : Fin (fin_range sz).length = Fin sz :=
      by rw [fin_range_len]
```

```tactics
    def fin_conv' {sz : Nat} (i : Fin sz) : Fin (fin_range sz).length :=
      ‚ü®i.1, by rw [fin_range_len]; cases i; assumption‚ü©
```

    def fin_range (sz : Nat) : List (Fin sz) :=
      match sz with
      | 0 => []
      | sz' + 1 => ‚ü®0, Nat.zero_lt_succ _‚ü© :: (fin_range sz').map lift_fin

    def fin_range' (sz : Nat) : List (Fin sz) :=
      List.replicate sz 0
      |>.mapFinIdx (őĽ i _ h => ‚ü®i, by rwa [List.length_replicate] at h‚ü©)

    theorem map_mapFinIdx {őĪ ő≤ őī} (l : List őĪ) (f : (i : Nat) ‚Üí őĪ ‚Üí (h : i < l.length) ‚Üí ő≤) (g : ő≤ ‚Üí őī) :
      (l.mapFinIdx f).map g = l.mapFinIdx (őĽ i v h => g (f i v h)) := by
        revert f g
        induction l with
        | nil => intros _ _; rfl
        | cons hd tl HR =>
          intro f g
          simp only [List.mapFinIdx_cons, List.map_cons, HR, List.length_cons]

    theorem fin_range_eq {sz : Nat} :
      fin_range sz = fin_range' sz := by
        induction sz with
        | zero => rfl
        | succ n HR =>
          dsimp [fin_range]; rw [HR]; dsimp [fin_range']
          simp only [
            List.replicate, List.length_cons, List.mapFinIdx_cons, Fin.zero_eta,
            map_mapFinIdx, lift_fin
          ]

    theorem fin_in_fin_range' (sz : Nat) (i : Fin sz) : i ‚ąą fin_range' sz := by
      simp only [fin_range', List.mem_mapFinIdx, List.length_replicate]
      exists i.1, i.2

    theorem fin_in_fin_range (sz : Nat) (i : Fin sz) : i ‚ąą fin_range sz := by
      rw [fin_range_eq]; exact fin_in_fin_range' sz i

    theorem fin_range_len (sz : Nat) :
      (fin_range sz).length = sz := by
        induction sz with
        | zero => rfl
        | succ sz HR => simpa [fin_range, HR]

    def fin_range_len_cast {sz : Nat} : Fin (fin_range sz).length = Fin sz :=
      by rw [fin_range_len]

    def fin_conv {sz : Nat} (i : Fin (fin_range sz).length) : Fin sz :=
      ‚ü®i.1, by cases i; rename_i v h; rw [fin_range_len] at h; simpa only‚ü©

    def fin_conv' {sz : Nat} (i : Fin sz) : Fin (fin_range sz).length :=
      ‚ü®i.1, by rw [fin_range_len]; cases i; assumption‚ü©

    theorem fin_conv_conv {sz : Nat} (i : Fin (fin_range sz).length) :
      fin_conv' (fin_conv i) = i := by rfl

    theorem fin_conv_conv' {sz : Nat} (i : Fin sz) :
      fin_conv (fin_conv' i) = i := by rfl

    theorem mapFinIdx_length {őĪ ő≤} (l : List őĪ) (f : (i : Nat) ‚Üí őĪ ‚Üí (h : i < l.length) ‚Üí ő≤) :
      (List.mapFinIdx l f).length = l.length := by
        simpa only [List.length_mapFinIdx]

    theorem mapFinIdx_get {őĪ ő≤} (l : List őĪ) (f : (i : Nat) ‚Üí őĪ ‚Üí (h : i < l.length) ‚Üí ő≤) (i : Fin (List.mapFinIdx l f).length) :
      (List.mapFinIdx l f).get i = f i l[i] (by rw [‚ÜźmapFinIdx_length l f]; exact i.2) := by
        simpa

    theorem fin_range_get {sz : Nat} {i : Fin (fin_range sz).length} :
      (fin_range sz).get i = fin_conv i := by

      -- dsimp [fin_range]
      -- apply mapFinIdx_get
      sorry

    theorem fin_cast {sz sz' : Nat} (h : sz = sz' := by rfl) :
      Fin sz = Fin sz' := by subst h; rfl

  end fin_range

    def fin_range (sz : Nat) : List (Fin sz) :=
      match sz with
      | 0 => []
      | sz' + 1 => ‚ü®0, Nat.zero_lt_succ _‚ü© :: (fin_range sz').map lift_fin

    def fin_range' (sz : Nat) : List (Fin sz) :=
      List.replicate sz 0
      |>.mapFinIdx (őĽ i _ h => ‚ü®i, by rwa [List.length_replicate] at h‚ü©)

    theorem map_mapFinIdx {őĪ ő≤ őī} (l : List őĪ) (f : (i : Nat) ‚Üí őĪ ‚Üí (h : i < l.length) ‚Üí ő≤) (g : ő≤ ‚Üí őī) :
      (l.mapFinIdx f).map g = l.mapFinIdx (őĽ i v h => g (f i v h)) := by
        revert f g
        induction l with
        | nil => intros _ _; rfl
        | cons hd tl HR =>
          intro f g
          simp only [List.mapFinIdx_cons, List.map_cons, HR, List.length_cons]

    theorem fin_range_eq {sz : Nat} :
      fin_range sz = fin_range' sz := by
        induction sz with
        | zero => rfl
        | succ n HR =>
          dsimp [fin_range]; rw [HR]; dsimp [fin_range']
          simp only [
            List.replicate, List.length_cons, List.mapFinIdx_cons, Fin.zero_eta,
            map_mapFinIdx, lift_fin
          ]

    theorem fin_in_fin_range' (sz : Nat) (i : Fin sz) : i ‚ąą fin_range' sz := by
      simp only [fin_range', List.mem_mapFinIdx, List.length_replicate]
      exists i.1, i.2

    theorem fin_in_fin_range (sz : Nat) (i : Fin sz) : i ‚ąą fin_range sz := by
      rw [fin_range_eq]; exact fin_in_fin_range' sz i

    theorem fin_range_len (sz : Nat) :
      (fin_range sz).length = sz := by
        induction sz with
        | zero => rfl
        | succ sz HR => simpa [fin_range, HR]

    def fin_range_len_cast {sz : Nat} : Fin (fin_range sz).length = Fin sz :=
      by rw [fin_range_len]

    def fin_conv {sz : Nat} (i : Fin (fin_range sz).length) : Fin sz :=
      ‚ü®i.1, by cases i; rename_i v h; rw [fin_range_len] at h; simpa only‚ü©

    def fin_conv' {sz : Nat} (i : Fin sz) : Fin (fin_range sz).length :=
      ‚ü®i.1, by rw [fin_range_len]; cases i; assumption‚ü©

    theorem fin_conv_conv {sz : Nat} (i : Fin (fin_range sz).length) :
      fin_conv' (fin_conv i) = i := by rfl

    theorem fin_conv_conv' {sz : Nat} (i : Fin sz) :
      fin_conv (fin_conv' i) = i := by rfl

    theorem mapFinIdx_length {őĪ ő≤} (l : List őĪ) (f : (i : Nat) ‚Üí őĪ ‚Üí (h : i < l.length) ‚Üí ő≤) :
      (List.mapFinIdx l f).length = l.length := by
        simpa only [List.length_mapFinIdx]

    theorem mapFinIdx_get {őĪ ő≤} (l : List őĪ) (f : (i : Nat) ‚Üí őĪ ‚Üí (h : i < l.length) ‚Üí ő≤) (i : Fin (List.mapFinIdx l f).length) :
      (List.mapFinIdx l f).get i = f i l[i] (by rw [‚ÜźmapFinIdx_length l f]; exact i.2) := by
        simpa

    theorem fin_range_get {sz : Nat} {i : Fin (fin_range sz).length} :
      (fin_range sz).get i = fin_conv i := by
      -- rw [fin_range_eq]
      -- dsimp [fin_range]
      -- apply mapFinIdx_get
      sorry

    theorem fin_cast {sz sz' : Nat} (h : sz = sz' := by rfl) :
      Fin sz = Fin sz' := by subst h; rfl

  end fin_range

    def fin_range (sz : Nat) : List (Fin sz) :=
      match sz with
      | 0 => []
      | sz' + 1 => ‚ü®0, Nat.zero_lt_succ _‚ü© :: (fin_range sz').map lift_fin

    def fin_range' (sz : Nat) : List (Fin sz) :=
      List.replicate sz 0
      |>.mapFinIdx (őĽ i _ h => ‚ü®i, by rwa [List.length_replicate] at h‚ü©)

    theorem map_mapFinIdx {őĪ ő≤ őī} (l : List őĪ) (f : (i : Nat) ‚Üí őĪ ‚Üí (h : i < l.length) ‚Üí ő≤) (g : ő≤ ‚Üí őī) :
      (l.mapFinIdx f).map g = l.mapFinIdx (őĽ i v h => g (f i v h)) := by
        revert f g
        induction l with
        | nil => intros _ _; rfl
        | cons hd tl HR =>
          intro f g
          simp only [List.mapFinIdx_cons, List.map_cons, HR, List.length_cons]

    theorem fin_range_eq {sz : Nat} :
      fin_range sz = fin_range' sz := by
        induction sz with
        | zero => rfl
        | succ n HR =>
          dsimp [fin_range]; rw [HR]; dsimp [fin_range']
          simp only [
            List.replicate, List.length_cons, List.mapFinIdx_cons, Fin.zero_eta,
            map_mapFinIdx, lift_fin
          ]

    theorem fin_in_fin_range' (sz : Nat) (i : Fin sz) : i ‚ąą fin_range' sz := by
      simp only [fin_range', List.mem_mapFinIdx, List.length_replicate]
      exists i.1, i.2

    theorem fin_in_fin_range (sz : Nat) (i : Fin sz) : i ‚ąą fin_range sz := by
      rw [fin_range_eq]; exact fin_in_fin_range' sz i

    theorem fin_range_len (sz : Nat) :
      (fin_range sz).length = sz := by
        induction sz with
        | zero => rfl
        | succ sz HR => simpa [fin_range, HR]

    def fin_range_len_cast {sz : Nat} : Fin (fin_range sz).length = Fin sz :=
      by rw [fin_range_len]

    def fin_conv {sz : Nat} (i : Fin (fin_range sz).length) : Fin sz :=
      ‚ü®i.1, by cases i; rename_i v h; rw [fin_range_len] at h; simpa only‚ü©

    def fin_conv' {sz : Nat} (i : Fin sz) : Fin (fin_range sz).length :=
      ‚ü®i.1, by rw [fin_range_len]; cases i; assumption‚ü©

    theorem fin_conv_conv {sz : Nat} (i : Fin (fin_range sz).length) :
      fin_conv' (fin_conv i) = i := by rfl

    theorem fin_conv_conv' {sz : Nat} (i : Fin sz) :
      fin_conv (fin_conv' i) = i := by rfl

    theorem mapFinIdx_length {őĪ ő≤} (l : List őĪ) (f : (i : Nat) ‚Üí őĪ ‚Üí (h : i < l.length) ‚Üí ő≤) :
      (List.mapFinIdx l f).length = l.length := by
        simpa only [List.length_mapFinIdx]

    theorem mapFinIdx_get {őĪ ő≤} (l : List őĪ) (f : (i : Nat) ‚Üí őĪ ‚Üí (h : i < l.length) ‚Üí ő≤) (i : Fin (List.mapFinIdx l f).length) :
      (List.mapFinIdx l f).get i = f i l[i] (by rw [‚ÜźmapFinIdx_length l f]; exact i.2) := by
        simpa

    theorem fin_range_get {sz : Nat} {i : Fin (fin_range sz).length} :
      (fin_range sz).get i = fin_conv i := by
      -- rw [fin_range_eq]
      -- dsimp [fin_range]
      -- apply mapFinIdx_get
      sorry

    theorem fin_cast {sz sz' : Nat} (h : sz = sz' := by rfl) :
      Fin sz = Fin sz' := by subst h; rfl

  end fin_range

    ‚ąÉ i : Fin (List.length l), l[i] = x := by

  theorem list_insertIdx_length {l1 l2 : List őĪ} {idx : Nat} {hidx : idx <= l1.length}
    {l1 : List őĪ} {elt : őĪ} :
    (l1 ++ l2).insertIdx idx elt = (l1.insertIdx idx elt) ++ l2
    := by
      induction l1 generalizing idx hidx with
      | nil =>
        -- from the fact idx <= l1.length = [].length
        have : idx = 0 := by sorry
        subst idx
        simp
      | cons hd tl HR =>
        simp
        sorry

  theorem list_set_sum {l : List Nat} {idx : Nat} {e : Nat} (hidx : idx < l.length := by simpa) :
    (l.set idx e).sum = l.sum - l[idx] + e := by
      induction idx generalizing l with
      | zero =>
        cases l with
        | nil => contradiction
        | cons hd tl => simp; apply Nat.add_comm
      | succ idx' HR =>
        cases l with
        | nil =>
          contradiction
        | cons hd tl =>
          simp at hidx ‚äĘ
          rw [@HR tl hidx]
          sorry -- Obviously true

  theorem list_take_sum {l : List Nat} {idx : Nat} (hidx : idx < l.length := by simpa) :
    (l.take idx).sum + l[idx] = (l.take (idx + 1)).sum := by
      induction idx generalizing l with
      | zero =>
        cases l with
        | nil => contradiction
        | cons hd tl =>
          simp only [
            List.take_zero, List.sum_nil, List.getElem_cons_zero,
            Nat.zero_add, List.take_succ_cons, List.sum_cons, Nat.add_zero
          ]
      | succ idx' HR =>
        induction l with
        | nil => contradiction
        | cons hd tl HR' =>
          simp at hidx ‚äĘ
          rw [Nat.add_assoc, @HR tl hidx]

  theorem list_take_sum_le {l : List Nat} {idx : Nat} :
    (l.take idx).sum ‚Č§ l.sum := by
      induction idx generalizing l with
      | zero => simp
      | succ idx' HR =>
        cases l with
        | nil => simp
        | cons hd tl => simp only [List.take_succ_cons, List.sum_cons, Nat.add_le_add_iff_left, HR]
